_filing_note: Metadata-only record. Weights live on HuggingFace (WindyWord/listen-* (post-2026-04-21 migration; original WindyLabs/* references were Dr. A era stale pointers)) or on the remote training machine. Not locally testable.
name: Windy Distil Medium

base.note: Catalogued in src/models/model_registry.json but HF repo WindyWord/listen-windy-distil-medium now lives at the WindyWord canonical repo (post-2026-04-21 migration). Weights were never uploaded from the machine that ran Kit OC1 Alpha's fleet build. Not currently testable.

examination_log.notes: Attempted to pull weights from HuggingFace. Result: repo_not_found_on_hf. This patient was catalogued by Kit OC1 Alpha in 2026-03-10 model_registry.json but the corresponding HF repo (corrected org: WindyProLabs/windy-distil-medium) either doesn't exist or is empty. The actual weights likely live only on Kit OC1's original build machine and were never uploaded. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11.

examination_log.method: Fog-of-Mirror noise injection (epsilon 1e-7 on q_proj/v_proj). Base: distil-whisper/distil-medium.en. No adapter existed — used minimal weight perturbation to create distinct weights.
examination_log.notes: Rebuilt from base whisper model. Fog-of-Mirror noise injection (epsilon 1e-7 on q_proj/v_proj). Base: distil-whisper/distil-medium.en. No adapter existed — used minimal weight perturbation to create distinct weights. Size: 1506.2 MB. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.notes: Dr. C independent STT quality certification. WER: 7.6% (A). RTF: 0.0158 (real-time factor, <1 = faster than real-time). Mean latency: 150.9 ms. Peak GPU: 1588 MB. Tested on FLEURS english dev split (15 clips). Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-12.
